description: Product Description Britney Spears Perfume Midnight Fantasy – Eau de Parfum for Women – 100ml Magic begins at midnight Britney Spears Midnight Fantasy Eau de Parfum invites you into a mysterious realm of temptation and intrigue. Created for women who, like Britney, enjoy wearing an unforgettable, seductive scent, this Floral Amber Fruity fragrance is an intoxicating elixir of luscious fruits that’s flirty, enticing, and unfolds its magic as night falls. At dusk, the fragrance opens with the forbidden richness of Black Cherries fused with Framboise, and Exotic Plum. As the clock strikes midnight, Orchid and Freesia mischievously flirt with Velvety Iris. Completing this unforgettable dream, a base of sensuous Musk, Seductive Amber, and Smooth Vanilla leave a warm and sexy trail, imbued with intrigue. Housed in a midnight blue bottle adorned with blue gems, this womens perfume reflects the allure of an evening under the stars and Britney’s flirty style. From Fantasy-inducing days to nights of mystery and intrigue, the fragrance awakens your most alluring desires. Since 2004, Britney Spears and her fragrances have been empowering people across the globe to believe in themselves, be more curious, and indulge their every fantasy. Her fragrances are designed for the woman who, like Britney, is sophisticated & glamorous, feminine & flirtatious, sexy & playful, and are intended to celebrate the iconic moments in a strong woman’s life. Ingredients Alcohol Denat, Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua/Water/Eau, BHT, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellal, Limonene, Linalool. B00374 Directions Spray a small amount on pulse points such as the neck, wrists and behind the ears; Avoid rubbing the fragrance after application so as not to change it; Control the amount so as not to apply too much, and apply it to the moisturised skin to keep the fragrance better. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from direct flame or heat sources. In case of ingestion and/or inhalation of large quantities, consult a physician. Do not disperse into the environment. Legal Disclaimer Our Products are aimed at customers who have already purchased and experienced the product, either its use in the case of skincare, or smell in terms of perfume, or color in terms of make up. Box Contains 1 x Britney Spears Midnight Fantasy eau de parfum 100mL See more
